summary: The diff shows CubeVisualization.tsx was modified with the integrated render pipeline. The file summary confirms all major features are present: ACES tonemapping, sharpening (0.15), glints (threshold 2.5, strength 3.0), dual-composer bloom (intensity 0.8, radius 0.65, threshold 0.1), NoToneMapping, autoClear=false, black clear color, BackgroundSphere on layer 0 with renderOrder -1000 and NaN-safe fragment shader, robust useFrame render loop, bloomTexture via readBuffer.texture, HueSaturationPass removed, and Suspense fallback with opaque black background. The truncated diff content confirms the composite shader fragment with all required ACES/sharpening/glints code is present. All 7 requirements appear to be implemented based on the available evidence.
